title: coffea mabesae
intro: Coffea mabesae, a species of wild coffee plant, is a rare and endangered plant native to Madagascar. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coffea mabesae include its ability to improve cognitive function, boost energy levels, and reduce stress and anxiety. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink.
